column2: Platform Information
Link to Form
Account Required
Modality
Question
Your full name
Your contact details, including email address
Confirmation whether you are making this application as an individual researcher or as part of a team of researchers.
If you are making this application on behalf of a team of researchers, please provide information requested below for each researcher in the research team

Information to demonstrate that you are a researcher, including the name and contact details of your employer or company you act on behalf of, or your not-for-profit entity, institution, organisation or association
Full details about the research you are undertaking or wish to undertake, for which data is sought

An explanation of the respects in which the research will contribute to the detection, identification and understanding of systemic risks in the EU pursuant to Article 34(1), including by reference to the specific systemic risk which you consider the research will contribute to, and to the assessment of the adequacy, efficiency and impacts of the risk mitigation measures pursuant to Article 35
Full details of the expected duration of the research
Information on whether the research will be published and in what forum
A description of the data that is publicly accessible on the App Store interface that you want access to
The time period you want the data to cover
An explanation of why the data and time frames requested are necessary for, and proportionate to, the purposes of the research

A comprehensive explanation of how the request for data access appropriately protects other relevant rights and legitimate interests, including the protection of personal data, trade secrets, and other confidential information
Confirmation that there is no other intended use of the data outside of this research

Any commercial interests (such as private companies, partnerships or other businesses in any form whatsoever) in which you are involved in any capacity, including through contractual or other arrangements of employment, engagement, retention or any other association
Any commercial interests that fund you or your research organisation

the source/s of funding, details regarding the funding model and amounts raised for the research through both direct and indirect sources of funding, including grants, bursaries, commissions, contingency fees, other expected future payments or other funding provided in connection with this research (whether by academic institutions, research institutions, governmental institutions, commercial interests, non-profit entities, philanthropists or otherwise), and the terms on which such funding is granted
If the funding model comprises a combination of the above, detail the approximate percentages and proportion of each source of funding and identify each such source

Details of the specific data security and confidentiality arrangements (including appropriate technical and organisational measures) which you have in place, or propose to put in place, in connection with the data to which access is sought. This should include details of which persons will be afforded access to the data you are requesting and on what terms, and how the data you are requesting may be combined with other data

Information and documents to demonstrate that you are capable of fulfilling the specific data security and confidentiality requirements corresponding to each request and which are necessary to protect personal data. You must inform us of the appropriate technical and organisational measures that you have put in place to this end
The duration of time you intend to store the requested data
How you will ensure the requested data is only used for the research described in this application
